## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss sales process efficiency and role responsibilities between Marcel and Bruno at fwd.digital.](https://fathom.video/share/u4NXBuEm9xP6x_d4ZsKyN1KSZWqdsNub?tab=summary&timestamp=25.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Process gaps**: Current sales follow-up process is inconsistent, causing potential revenue loss (e.g., $21k/mo deal)](https://fathom.video/share/u4NXBuEm9xP6x_d4ZsKyN1KSZWqdsNub?tab=summary&timestamp=153.0)
  - [**Workload imbalance**: Marcel feels overwhelmed with 14+ daily meetings; needs more support from Bruno/team](https://fathom.video/share/u4NXBuEm9xP6x_d4ZsKyN1KSZWqdsNub?tab=summary&timestamp=311.0)
  - [**Compensation concerns**: Bruno expresses financial struggles; Marcel explains pay structure limitations](https://fathom.video/share/u4NXBuEm9xP6x_d4ZsKyN1KSZWqdsNub?tab=summary&timestamp=539.0)
  - [**Communication needed**: Misalignment on expectations and workload; frank discussion about effort vs. compensation required](https://fathom.video/share/u4NXBuEm9xP6x_d4ZsKyN1KSZWqdsNub?tab=summary&timestamp=691.0)

## Topics

### Current Sales Process Challenges

  - [Marcel struggling to manage follow-ups for 14+ daily meetings](https://fathom.video/share/u4NXBuEm9xP6x_d4ZsKyN1KSZWqdsNub?tab=summary&timestamp=311.0)
  - [Risk of losing high-value prospects (e.g., $21k/mo Arcade deal) due to lack of immediate follow-up](https://fathom.video/share/u4NXBuEm9xP6x_d4ZsKyN1KSZWqdsNub?tab=summary&timestamp=167.0)
  - [Inconsistent access to meeting recordings (Zoom settings issue)](https://fathom.video/share/u4NXBuEm9xP6x_d4ZsKyN1KSZWqdsNub?tab=summary&timestamp=207.0)
  - [Uncertainty about task ownership between team members (Marcel, Bruno, Jimmy, Alice)](https://fathom.video/share/u4NXBuEm9xP6x_d4ZsKyN1KSZWqdsNub?tab=summary&timestamp=464.0)

### Proposed Process Improvements

  - [Create "team@" email account for automatic meeting access](https://fathom.video/share/u4NXBuEm9xP6x_d4ZsKyN1KSZWqdsNub?tab=summary&timestamp=215.0)
  - [Prioritize follow-ups for verbally committed prospects to reduce pipeline fluff](https://fathom.video/share/u4NXBuEm9xP6x_d4ZsKyN1KSZWqdsNub?tab=summary&timestamp=265.0)
  - [Bruno to take lead on Marcel's meeting follow-ups (higher priority than Jimmy's)](https://fathom.video/share/u4NXBuEm9xP6x_d4ZsKyN1KSZWqdsNub?tab=summary&timestamp=388.0)
  - [Marcel to ping Bruno directly with meeting links for immediate action](https://fathom.video/share/u4NXBuEm9xP6x_d4ZsKyN1KSZWqdsNub?tab=summary&timestamp=388.0)

### Workload and Compensation Discussion

  - [Marcel emphasizes company growth (closing $12M deal, hiring 75 people)](https://fathom.video/share/u4NXBuEm9xP6x_d4ZsKyN1KSZWqdsNub?tab=summary&timestamp=530.0)
  - [Bruno expresses personal financial struggles (making "Brazil money", using savings)](https://fathom.video/share/u4NXBuEm9xP6x_d4ZsKyN1KSZWqdsNub?tab=summary&timestamp=559.0)
  - [Marcel explains pay structure limitations ($200k/yr not justifiable for Bruno's experience level)](https://fathom.video/share/u4NXBuEm9xP6x_d4ZsKyN1KSZWqdsNub?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
  - [Comparison: Account manager handling 5 accounts earns $5k/month](https://fathom.video/share/u4NXBuEm9xP6x_d4ZsKyN1KSZWqdsNub?tab=summary&timestamp=648.0)

### Work-Life Balance Concerns

  - [Bruno trying to avoid burnout, hesitant to work 12-14 hour days consistently](https://fathom.video/share/u4NXBuEm9xP6x_d4ZsKyN1KSZWqdsNub?tab=summary&timestamp=673.0)
  - [Marcel perceives lack of urgency/effort from Bruno](https://fathom.video/share/u4NXBuEm9xP6x_d4ZsKyN1KSZWqdsNub?tab=summary&timestamp=691.0)
  - [Miscommunication about expectations and workload](https://fathom.video/share/u4NXBuEm9xP6x_d4ZsKyN1KSZWqdsNub?tab=summary&timestamp=701.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Implement "team@" email for automatic meeting access](https://fathom.video/share/u4NXBuEm9xP6x_d4ZsKyN1KSZWqdsNub?tab=summary&timestamp=215.0)
  - [Bruno to prioritize Marcel's meeting follow-ups as "morning priorities"](https://fathom.video/share/u4NXBuEm9xP6x_d4ZsKyN1KSZWqdsNub?tab=summary&timestamp=388.0)
  - [Schedule frank discussion about workload expectations vs. compensation](https://fathom.video/share/u4NXBuEm9xP6x_d4ZsKyN1KSZWqdsNub?tab=summary&timestamp=691.0)
  - [Review and clarify roles/responsibilities for Marcel, Bruno, Jimmy, and Alice](https://fathom.video/share/u4NXBuEm9xP6x_d4ZsKyN1KSZWqdsNub?tab=summary&timestamp=464.0)
  - [Explore options to provide additional support for Marcel's busy meeting schedule](https://fathom.video/share/u4NXBuEm9xP6x_d4ZsKyN1KSZWqdsNub?tab=summary&timestamp=311.0)
